articles.title: Axis MF front-running case: Sebi bars former MF dealer Viresh Joshi for 7 years, imposes ₹3 crore penalty
articles.summary: Sebi has barred former Axis Mutual Fund chief dealer Viresh Joshi from the securities market for seven years over his alleged role in a front-running case. The regulator also imposed a ₹3 crore penalty on Joshi and took action against 20 other individuals linked to the matter.

articles.title: Cabinet approves Ballari-Guntakal rail project to boost freight, passenger connectivity
articles.summary: The Union cabinet approved a Rs 1,264-crore railway project for new lines. This initiative will enhance freight movement and passenger connectivity across key states. The project aims to ease congestion and improve logistics efficiency significantly.

articles.title: Honda India's big plan: Elevate facelift, 0 Series electric SUV and Prelude Hybrid Coupe — all 3 upcoming cars explained
articles.summary: Honda India is launching 3 new cars: Elevate facelift, a 0 Series EV SUV with 450–500 km range, and the iconic Prelude Hybrid Coupe with 200 PS. Full preview inside.

articles.title: SBI Circle Based Officers recruitment: State Bank selects 1,930 for customer-first banking
articles.summary: State Bank of India has selected 1,930 Circle Based Officers for its branch network across India. The move underlines the bank's push for customer-centric, digital-first and future-ready banking services.

articles.title: Delhi Metro's biggest expansion ever: 217 km, 123 new stations, 16 corridors planned under Phases 4, 5A and 5B
articles.summary: Delhi Metro is expanding by 217 km across Phases 4, 5A and 5B — 123 new stations, 16 corridors connecting Delhi, Faridabad, Sonipat, airport and NCR by 2030 and beyond.

articles.title: Education, career, controversies: Everything you need to know about Union Minister Dharmendra Pradhan
articles.summary: Dharmendra Pradhan is India's Union Education Minister and an MP from Odisha. Here's his complete educational background, political career and why he's in the NEET controversy news.

articles.title: Vande Bharat gets a new route from August 17 — Gandhigram stop added, Saurashtra towns get direct access to Ahmedabad
articles.summary: Veraval–Sabarmati Vande Bharat gets a new route from August 17 via Gandhigram, Junagadh, Botad and Dholka. New departure: 3:50 PM Veraval, arrives Sabarmati 10:25 PM.

articles.title: BHAVYA Rasayan scheme: Cabinet approves Rs 3,030 crore for three chemical parks
articles.summary: The Union cabinet approved a new Rs 3,030-crore scheme for three dedicated chemical parks. This initiative aims to strengthen India's chemicals sector with world-class infrastructure. The Bharat Audyogik Vikas Yojana Rasayan scheme will be implemented over five years.

articles.title: Sensex down 900 points, Nifty50 ends below 23,800: Why stock market crashed today
articles.summary: Indian stock markets closed lower for a fifth consecutive session on Friday. Rising oil prices and Middle East tensions fueled investor caution and market pressure. Foreign institutional investors continued their selling trend, impacting market sentiment negatively.

articles.title: Why Wipro Consumer is betting Rs 256 crore on two FMCG brands
articles.summary: The FMCG major is using acquisitions, not mega deals, to build a stronger portfolio in high-growth home and personal care categories amid the rise of quick commerce.

articles.title: GST compensation cess is gone. Why SBI Research says states will still gain ₹1.43 lakh crore
articles.summary: The end of the GST compensation cess has raised concerns over states' finances, but SBI Research says the revised tax framework could actually leave states better off.

articles.title: 12.5% to 10%: Why Trump admin imposed reduced tariff rate on India & what it means
articles.summary: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer announced the revised tariffs on 60 economies on Thursday, one day before the expiry of the temporary additional 10% duties that had been imposed on imports from all countries.

articles.title: Ahead of mega ₹9,275-crore IPO, Manipal plans 3,000 new beds, eyes expansion
articles.summary: Hospital chain says higher occupancy, acquisitions and expansion into new markets will drive growth; July 29 IPO to leave it virtually debt-free.

articles.title: From gold to luxury properties: ACB's ₹100–150 crore haul from Telangana engineer explained
articles.summary: The ACB registered the DA case after gathering evidence that Ramana allegedly had much more wealth than he could have earned from his known sources of income.

articles.title: India's fertiliser game plan: Over 32 lakh tonnes imported in Q1; strengthened supply chain through overseas deals
articles.summary: India imported over 32 lakh tonnes of key fertilizers during the first quarter. Domestic production of fertilizers reached 115.72 lakh tonnes in the same period. The government is diversifying import sources to mitigate supply chain risks.

articles.title: Living in a rented apartment and buying an EV? Check these 7 charging problems
articles.summary: Before buying an EV for a rented apartment, check parking rights, wiring capacity, society approval, electricity billing, charger removal and reliable public alternatives.

articles.title: Haldiram’s and Lakshmi Mittal’s space bet: The investors behind India’s rocket unicorn
articles.summary: Haldiram’s, Lakshmi Mittal, and Mukesh Bansal backed Skyroot Aerospace, India’s first private space unicorn, turning early bets into a ₹700 crore success story.

articles.title: Vijay’s last film creates a storm: Fans turn theatres into celebration zones
articles.summary: Vijay’s final film "Jana Nayagan" sparks global fan frenzy, transforming theatres into celebration zones as admirers honor his farewell to cinema before politics.

articles.title: Vijay Sethupathi, Simran join Regal Jewellers as brand ambassadors
articles.summary: Alongside the launch, Regal Jewellers has unveiled its Tamil Nadu campaign, "Indha Maatram... Adhu Nalladhu Dhaane?", featuring the two stars

articles.title: India’s medal challenge begins: Why Glasgow 2026 will be a different battle
articles.summary: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games begin with a new format, fewer sports and a tough medal challenge for India as the contingent aims to shine without traditional medal events.

Hyundai Bayon 2026: Underbody CNG tank, 1.5L petrol, CVT, ventilated seats — the complete spec guide before launch
articles.summary: Hyundai Bayon is coming to India in 2026 with petrol and CNG options — first Hyundai over 4m with CNG. Expect 1.5L engine, ventilated seats, sunroof, ADAS and a boxy crossover design.

articles.title: 10% US tariff on India: What it means for the country's exports
articles.summary: United States imposed a ten percent tariff on Indian goods, offering some relief. Economists believe the immediate impact on India's exports will be limited. Reducing dependence on single markets and broadening global reach is crucial.

articles.title: Monsoon deficit, El Niño and inflation: Report flags India's biggest economic risks
articles.summary: The report says the southwest monsoon made a brief recovery during the first week of July after an exceptionally weak June, but the improvement proved short-lived. As of July 22, cumulative rainfall remained 19% below normal, with rainfall deficits widening again after mid-July.

articles.title: 'My partner is half-Indian': Elon Musk rejects racism claims; why his son is named after Chandrasekhar
articles.summary: Musk's latest remarks come against the backdrop of long-running criticism over some of his public statements. Over the years, he has faced accusations of amplifying divisive rhetoric on immigration and race, while also expressing support for several right-wing…

articles.title: Food inflation making a comeback? Why onions and vegetables are leading the price surge
articles.summary: Food inflation is back in focus as rising vegetable prices and an uneven monsoon threaten to push household budgets higher.

articles.title: 'No need to respond in advance': Canadian PM Mark Carney rules out retaliatory tariffs before Aug 19
articles.summary: Canada will not retaliate in advance against proposed US tariffs, preferring negotiations. Prime Minister Mark Carney stated that premature action would be counterproductive at this stage.

articles.title: RBI intervention lifts rupee 22 paise to 96.5 despite Brent crude topping $100
articles.summary: The Indian Rupee recovered 22 paise against the US dollar in early trade. This recovery occurred despite crude oil prices breaching the $100 a barrel mark. The Reserve Bank of India's intervention likely helped stabilize the domestic currency.

articles.title: Stock market today: Sensex tanks 700 pts; Nifty slips below 23,700 as Brent tops $100
Bullion watch: Gold falls over 2%, silver drops nearly 4% as crude prices soar to $100
Oil holds above $100 as Red Sea attacks and Kazakhstan outage tighten supplies
articles.summary: Oil prices have sharply rebounded, exceeding one hundred dollars per barrel. Attacks on Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea have revived supply fears. Kazakhstan's oil exports also faced disruptions, adding to global concerns.

IndiGo offers crisis management plan to settle CCI probe into flight disruption case
articles.summary: IndiGo has proposed commitments to the Competition Commission of India. These proposals aim to address concerns over past flight disruptions and unfair practices. The airline will establish a crisis management group and a passenger grievance mechanism.
